calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees
Off Calendar Mar-21-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-29-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Namnath appeared by zoom for Lydia Lowery.

The court noted that a petition for final distribution, and an inventory and appraisal have been filed, but it still has the order to appear/order to show cause, and asked where Mrs. Lowery is/why she's not here. Mr. Namnath stated that Mrs. Lowery is traveling, that he advised her that this was his fault, that he told her that she didn't have to appear because the order to appear was issued because he mistakenly did not appear at the last hearing, and that he would appear on her behalf. The court admonished Mr. Namnath for excusing his client, stated that this is contempt and told him not to do this again. Mr. Namnath apologized to the court, stated that he has been in contact with his client throughout the year, that he contacted her in August regarding the accounting, that he dropped the ball, and that he feels terrible about wasting the court's time and resources. The court stated that it appreciates what has been filed and informed Mr. Namnath that he gets one pass only. Status on close of estate, and the order to appear/order to show cause are off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-29-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Continued To Nov-29-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Administrator Lydia Lowery and Attorney William D.S. Namnath to appear on Nov-29-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. An Order to Show Cause as to why the court should not order attorney William D.S. Namnath to pay sanctions in the amount of $250 for failure to Appear is set for the same date. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
